name: Basic Vinaigrette (Cooks Garden)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, make a paste of the vinegar, the mustard, and the garlic.
2. Begin whisking in the olive oil a few drops at a time.
3. Continue adding the oil slowly, whisking continuously until all the oil has been incorporated.
4. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Make a delicious variation by substituting balsamic vinegar and honey mustard.
